# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-microservice
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-microservice
        image: <YOUR_NODEJS_IMAGE>
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
          - name: MONGODB_URI
            value: mongodb://<YOUR_MONGODB_USER>:<YOUR_MONGODB_PASSWORD>@<YOUR_MONGODB_HOST>:27017/<YOUR_MONGODB_DATABASE>?authSource=admin&replicaSet=rs
